---
name: Enhancement Request
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing feature in Red Bank
title: '[ENHANCEMENT] '
labels: 'enhancement, improvement'
assignees: ''
---

## 🛠 Enhancement Description
A clear and concise description of the existing feature you want to improve and how it should change.

## 📉 Current Behavior
Describe how the feature currently works and why it is suboptimal.

## 📈 Expected Behavior
Describe how the feature should work after the enhancement is applied.

## 📸 Screenshots / Video
If applicable, add screenshots or videos demonstrating the current suboptimal behavior versus the expected outcome.

## 💻 Environment
If this enhancement is specific to a platform, please specify:
- [ ] iOS App
- [ ] Android App
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Database / PostGIS Engine

## ⚡ Priority
- [ ] Low (Minor polish or refactor)
- [ ] Medium (Noticeable UX/Performance improvement)
- [ ] High (Resolves significant friction or technical debt)

## ✅ Pre-flight Checklist
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this enhancement hasn't already been suggested.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, benchmarks, or analytics data supporting this enhancement.
